item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct tradeoff-structuring mode, laid out costs across budget, speed, and experience, and did not fire triage or impose a brake verdict. It preserved user ownership of the decision, with only light conditional framing at the end rather than choosing for the user."}
